summary: Excellent audience recording of a solid May 15 show – great source and clean mix make it a standout AUD tape.
review: Both reviewers praise this May 15 performance as a “nice” and “great find,” emphasizing that the audience (AUD) tape captures the band with clarity and balance, especially when compared to a poorly mixed soundboard version. The recording’s source and patch are described as excellent, resulting in an enjoyable listening experience despite the lack of specific song commentary.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings (5 and 4) highlight a solid performance and an audience recording that is praised for its quality, outweighing the limited detail on musical specifics.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Source and patch are noted as great; clean, well‑balanced mix that outshines a referenced bad soundboard recording. No reported dropouts or muffiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on setlist flow; reviewers simply describe the overall show as nice and enjoyable.
